topics.title: Black Bear Hires Bianca Parkes and Heather Phillips to Lead Marketing, Publicity
topics.angle: Independent studio Black Bear has hired Bianca Parkes and Heather Phillips to lead its marketing and publicity efforts.

sources.headline: Black Bear Hires Bianca Parkes and Heather Phillips to Lead Marketing, Publicity
sources.summary: Black Bear, the independent studio behind Sydney Sweeney s boxing drama Christy, has hired Bianca Parkes and Heather Phillips to oversee marketing and publicity efforts. Their appointments were announced amid the production company s efforts to expand into U.S. theatrical distribution. They will report to company s president of U.S. distribution Benjamin Kramer and round out a team [ ]

topics.title: La La Land Poster Fixes Ryan Gosling's Hand After 10 Years
topics.angle: A minor visual detail on the 'La La Land' poster has been corrected after 10 years.

sources.headline: La La Land Poster Fixes Ryan Gosling s Flat Hand After 10 Years of the Actor Being Haunted by It
sources.summary: At long last, Ryan Gosling s wish has been granted. After speaking out in multiple interviews over the years about his dislike of his hand placement as featured on the original La La Land theatrical release poster, Lionsgate has unveiled a new design for the movie s 10th anniversary with Gosling s flat hand now sticking out.
